objective: Build a typed, serde-backed ExploreConfig model persisted to project-local .grove/explore.json as the shared vocabulary for the S02 mcp-llm inner explorer subsystem.
key_changes: Added `pub mod explore;` to core/src/lib.rs and re-exported ExploreConfig, Mode, Provider in the curated public surface
New core/src/explore/mod.rs — module root re-exporting the config types
New core/src/explore/config.rs — Provider{Ollama,LlamaCpp}, Mode{Standard,Balanced,Aggressive}, ExploreConfig struct, all serde-backed (lowercase enum spellings)
load() reads+deserializes+validates; missing file steers to `grove init --as mcp-llm` / `grove config`
save() validates then writes atomically (temp file + rename) — hardening over the registry's plain fs::write
validate() rejects empty base_url/model, naming the offending field
Field-named enum errors via a private RawExploreConfig + manual Deserialize (serde's stock unknown-variant error names neither field nor struct) — satisfies AC #3
Default yields Ollama defaults with pinned model qwen2.5-coder:7b and allowed_tools=[grove,rg,grep,find] (review advisories #1, #2)
8 inline tests cover serde round-trip, defaults, validation errors, and atomic-write (no leftover temp file)
Gates green: full suite 146 tests pass, build warning-clean, clippy -D warnings clean, no clap in cargo tree, no fastcontext in core/
